title: Withered Foxy Jumpscare
description: 1/10000 chance of withered foxy jumpscaring you every second
body:
Inspired by the Terraria mod "1/10000 Chance for Withered Foxy Jumpscare Every Second" by ymy

features:

- find out yourself ;)

If you really wanna see the features ( – ⌓ – ):
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Features:
- 1/10000 per second chance to get jumpscared by Withered Foxy from FNaF 2
  - probability: around 2.78h for one
- Camera Shake (client-side, so it's server safe)
- Flashbang
- FOV increase
- LOUD sound
- Works in singleplayer and multiplayer

</details>
